title: Agent Test-to-Feature Mapping Schema
description: Validates one batch of Agent-generated test-to-feature mappings.

items.description: Feature name from the 56-feature canonical list

features_tested.description: Features this test demonstrably exercises. Limit to 1-5. ascend_attention_backend should only be included if the test specifically targets attention mechanics, not just because it uses --attention-backend ascend.

has_gsm8k_oracle.description: True if the test uses GSM8KAscendMixin, run_eval_few_shot_gsm8k, or has a ground-truth accuracy benchmark

test_type_override.description: Override for the auto-detected test type if incorrect

has_reference_oracle.description: True if the test compares against a reference model or ground-truth output

rationale.description: One-sentence explanation of why these features were selected
